name: Wi-Fi Coffee Machine
description: Wi-Fi connected coffee machine. It periodically transmits data regarding brewed coffees to monitor the number of capsules used. It supports a local connection for diagnostics.

assets.name: MQTT Broker
assets.description: Manages communication between internal device services via the MQTT protocol

assets.name: Wi-Fi Interface
assets.description: Wireless module for local network connection and data transmission to the remote server

assets.name: Remote Monitoring Server
assets.description: Collects data on produced coffees and manages remote monitoring of the device
